raw_consumer_statement:
Obviously the company had not read in full my prior correspondence regarding Citi XXXX XXXX XXXX # XX/XX/XXXX( & others? ), and any further correspondence regarding this account can be sent to the Attorney General, the detectives, the XXXX. XXXX Inspection service, and my Lawyer. I also request the case be given to the highest authority in your company. The is not an ordinary case of fraud. This case involves over 14 cards and up to {$130000.00} in card transactions. 
I am requesting video or photos of me using this card. You stating my phone was used to open the account is not sufficient, as these two suspects were at my house for 15-17 hours a day for 5 months and used my phone while I slept and also while I was awake. Stating I received correspondence from you at my house is also not sufficient. These two retrieved the mail from my mailbox everyday as XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX are XXXX. The suspect had made a XXXX account where I received an email everyday showing each piece of mail to be delivered the following day. ( Yes she had access to my email account. As I have stated 20 xs, they had access to everything ). She did THAT with my phone as well HELLO. Stating I did not call you when we found out about this fraud is incorrect. Please check your records. I called you and 13 other companies several times in the middle of XXXX. If payments were made to the account, they were made by these two and a card or account fraudulently opened in our names was used for payment. 
Your denial of this fraud claim is extremely disturbing, especially given the fact it was done to XXXX XXXX people, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, the other XXXX. Both who had excellent credit ratings prior to this traumatic takeover. This case will be televised and your company not participating in the investigation will definitely be a part of what was the most traumatizing part of it all.
